description: Perceptual hashes (pHash) of known logos to filter during image extraction. Add new entries as needed — threshold=14 catches scale/compression variants without cross-logo false positives.

logos.name: farmatic
logos.note: FARMATIC logo, grey-blue text (~298x49). Also matches white variant at distance 8.

logos.name: partner_logo_gold_pen
logos.note: Partner logo with gold pen motif (300x51 to 404x84)

logos.name: partner_logo_blue_orange
logos.note: Partner logo, blue and orange text (~360x117)
